data.raceComments: {"comment":"17. COMMON INTEREST finished sixth of 10 at long odds when fresh-up from a spell at this track last start. Racing in a fitter state is worth a second look. 11. MRS SECOMBE raced on the speed from the outset last start and finished a game nose second of six over 1250m at Morphettville Parks. Placed to advantage and jumping from the inside draw can go one better. 2. SHADOW EAGLE found the line well to finish third of 14 last time out over 1200m at this track after racing well back in the running to the turn. Trained here and is worth an each-way ticket. 13. SASSY FOR SURE wasn't that far away last start when finishing fourth of six over 1250m at Morphettville Parks when well supported. Trained here and can atone.","runners":[17,11,2,13],"exclusive":true}
